title: potentilla bolanderi var. parryi
intro: Potentilla bolanderi var. parryi, also known as Parry's cinquefoil, is a variety of the Potentilla bolanderi plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a perennial herb. Traditionally, Parry's cinquefoil has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating skin conditions. Parry's cinquefoil can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a qualified healthcare professional.
